name: khrecom
game: Kingdom Hearts RE Chain of Memories

options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: starting_cure
options.description: Toggle whether you should start with a Card Set Cure

options.name: starting_worlds
options.description: Number of random world cards to start with in addition to Traverse Town, which is always available.

options.name: days_locations
options.description: Toggle whether locations not available to the player until they watch 358/2 Days are included in the locations list.

options.name: checks_behind_leon
options.description: Toggle whether to include checks behind the Leon sleight tutorial.  If left off, the player can safely skip that room.

options.name: minigames
options.description: Toggle whether to include checks behind 100 Acre Woods Minigames.

options.name: levels
options.description: Toggle whether to include checks behind Sleights received from Leveling Up.

options.name: exp_multiplier
options.description: Multiplier to apply to XP received.

options.name: attack_power
options.description: Modifier for Sora's strike power.  Default is 10

options.name: value_0_on
options.display_name: 0 Value Cards on Card Set Number
options.description: Determines which consecutive card set 0 value cards are found on.  Set to 0 if you would like it be impossible to receive this value.

options.name: enemy_card_amount
options.description:
Determines the number of enemy cards shuffled into the pool.  There are 57 unique enemy cards in the game.
If this value is less than 57, the enemy cards chosen to be shuffled in will be random.

options.name: sleight_amount
options.description:
Determines the number of sleights shuffled into the pool.  There are 83 unique sleights in the game.
If this value is less than 83, the sleights chosen to be shuffled in will be random.

options.name: exclude_cards
options.description: Determines which attack, magic, item, or summon cards are to be exluded from the pool, if any.

options.name: exclude_enemy_cards
options.description: Determines which enemy cards should be excluded from the pool, if any.

options.name: exclude_sleights
options.description: Detmerines which sleights should be excluded from the pool, if any.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
